steps.title: Model the remaining corn
steps.content: Use time in hours as $x$ and bushels remaining as $y$. The bin starts with $24,000$ bushels, so one point is $(0,24000)$. After $5$ hours, $19,350$ bushels remain, giving $(5,19350)$.

steps.title: Fit the line in Desmos
steps.content: Enter $x_1=[0,5]$ and $y_1=[24000,19350]$, then type $y_1\sim m x_1+b$. Desmos gives $m=-930$ and $b=24000$, so the model is $$y=-930x+24000.$$

steps.title: Find when $12,840$ remains
steps.content: Set the model equal to $12,840$: $$-930x+24000=12840.$$ Solving gives $x=12$. The total time is 12 hours, which matches choice D.
